base_url.description: TVmaze API base URL override for tests or proxies.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 country code to scope the schedule to (e.g. US). Optional; omitted entirely when unset, matching TVmaze's own default-country behavior.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) to scope the schedule to. Optional; omitted entirely when unset, defaulting to today per TVmaze's own API behavior.
